= Sample Euro 2000 =

Group A

June 12   @ National Arena, Warsaw   Poland  1-1  Greece
June 12 18:00 @ Testonia Stadium   Testonia  2-0  Mockland

June 16   @ National Arena, Warsaw   Poland  2-1 a.e.t.  Mockland
June 16 18:00 @ Testonia Stadium   Testonia  0-0  Greece

Semi-finals

July 3   @ Olympiastadion   Poland  1-1 (1-1)  Testonia

Final

July 8   @ Olympiastadion   Poland  3-5 pen. 0-0 a.e.t. (0-0)  Testonia
